name: studio
description: Native-first agent team with unified init/doctor, explicit tool routing, Claude/Codex profiles, and single-owner reviews.

interface.shortDescription: Run a quality-gated living agent team with local context and optional external executors.
interface.longDescription: The owner gives a mission; Studio natively handles research, planning, design, implementation, QA, independent judgment, and integration. Only tools named by a run parameter or repository config become candidates. Each track has one worker lease and each review edge one owner, while valid evidence is reused without weakening ready-set parallelism, worktree isolation, or the integrated full gate.
defaultPrompt: Use $producer to run a mission through the living agent team.
The producer convenes crew into background runs; it never makes artifacts itself.
Require artifact and context evidence to pass QualityPlan floors before integration.
Continue fixes and delta QA in one stable review cycle; require a reason for full QA or fresh context.
Use task-worker without GitHub, task-github for GitHub delivery, and never lease both for one track.
Use session-review selectively for major or independence-required review edges.
Owner gates: mission contract, new epic, irreversible, external-publish, budget-raise.
